body:
Good morning, Alexandria friends.

Sorry I’ve been a bit absent lately, been dealing with some heavy IRL stuff, but I’ll bounce back. But that’s why I’ve kinda been absent for the last week-ish. I hope you all are doing wonderfully.

For those that aren’t aware, Mercury retrograde started Saturday and runs through March 21, so be careful with communication. Save early and often on electronic stuff, since mercury handles communication. Give extra time when traveling. And avoid major decisions if possible, since thinking sometimes comes out a little wonky.

I should be around today and will see if I can wring some more writing out of my muse for you all!

I hope you all have a wonderful day and I’ll see you around! 🖤🖤🖤
